title: Prešov, Prešov Region — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Prešov, Prešov Region: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Prešov is a city in Prešov Region with a population of 88,464. A historic city in eastern Slovakia, known for its beautifully preserved Renaissance and Baroque old town, the Solivar salt works, and a vibrant cultural scene.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
